issues_found.root_cause: executionTime variable used but never declared in mission-control-agent-runner.js — caused ReferenceError on every run
budgetState.daily_spent / daily_cap / daily_percentage can be undefined — .toFixed() on undefined throws TypeError
Not a crash loop — cron one-shot process exits after each run; restarts are scheduled triggers

fixes_applied.change: Added: const executionTime = result.duration_ms || (Date.now() - new Date(startedAt).getTime()); before writeback block
Wrapped budgetState fields in Number(x || 0).toFixed() to guard against undefined values
